title: Employment Specialist Intake
text:
## Employment Specialist Intake

**Client goal:** Find a {adjective} job where they can {verb} without feeling {emotion}.

**Preferred schedule:** {number} hours per week, ideally near {place}.

**Strengths:** {verb ending in -ing}, staying {adjective}, and explaining {plural noun} to confused supervisors.

**Barrier noted:** Transportation involves one {adjective} {vehicle} and a {place} that closes early.

**Next step:** Employment specialist will {verb} the resume, call a {job}, and practice interview answers {adverb}.

**Encouragement:** Bring {food}, confidence, and one {color} {object}.
